summary: The video depicts a rainy day on a multi-laned road with wet surfaces. Vehicles are traveling in both directions, adhering to traffic signals. A sedan ahead emits brake lights, indicating deceleration or stopping. Traffic flows smoothly without congestion.

events_timeline.event: A sedan emits brake lights, signaling deceleration or stopping.

uncertainties: The brake lights of the sedan may be attributed to braking or stopping.

risk_assessment.why: Smooth traffic flow with minimal congestion and adherence to traffic signals.
